title: Force Cell value to use String not Number Type
author: arsencenko
body:
Hello,

I have a problem my cell values for a specific column are treated as number instead of string
so on the Notepad if i open my CSV File the value is 1000.80 meanwhile in data converter is beign writen as 1000.8 .

Is there a way to force the cell values to be string type instead of number ?

comments.author: ShraddhaJ11
comments.body:
How to retrieve the Cell Text as Displayed in Excel?
for currency 340 , displayed value is $340.00 but cell.value and cell.text both return 340 only. So how to get the value with number format?
